page_metadata.biotools__summary: An R package to visualise RNA-seq read coverage across annotated exons. Introns of long transcripts can be rescaled to a fixed length for better visualisation of exonic coverage.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: An R package to visualise RNA-seq read coverage across annotated exons. Introns of long transcripts can be rescaled to a fixed length for better visualisation of exonic coverage.
